improvement: Cloudflare deployment-proof attestations now require the exact reviewed SLSA buildType and exact externalParameters in addition to structural validation and deny-by-default builder identity policy.

source_status.uncertainty: The local evaluator verifies statement contents only; cryptographic signature, certificate, transparency-log, and deployed-runtime verification remain separate gates.

verification.route: isolated Node 22-compatible test runtime using byte-equivalent committed modules
adversarial_cases: one-byte proof change produces a different digest

falsification_route: Show that an unknown external parameter is accepted.
Show that a changed artifact name, source repository, or buildType is accepted.
Show that the workflow can emit an attestation without the provenanceDecision being accepted.
Show that canonical comparison changes semantic values or permits type confusion.
privacy_boundary: No secret values, private chat, health information, diagnosis, treatment claim, or personal identifier is present.
deployment_blocker: Cloudflare environment credentials and a successful workflow dispatch are still required to obtain a resolving Pages URL and served-commit proof.
